'''Leonis Murthé''' was the science officer on board the [[Imperial extermination ship]] ''[[Azgoghk]]'' alongside [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mir Tork]].

==Biography==
Together, Leonis Murthé and Admiral Tork conducted a campaign of cleansing against [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with the goal of creating an all-[[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. Murthé was notorious for seeking the most painful and horrific methods of killing, prolonging the screams as long as possible before [[Death/Legends|death]]. Tork even acquired for Murthé an old [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], which Murthé greatly enjoyed.<ref name="aod"/>

A surviving [[Gulmarid]] named [[Slique Brighteyes]] hired [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to kill Tork and Murthé in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Fett did so on [[Malicar 3]], after shooting down and infiltrating the ''Azgoghk''. Murthé attempted to fend off Fett with his lightsaber, but the attempt was completely ineffective and Fett set Murthé on fire. Murthé ran around screaming and begging for a quicker death, but only received one—a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shot to the forehead—when he nearly ambushed Fett.<ref name="aod"/>

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Agent of Doom]]'' {{1st}}
